name: GH_ObjectEventType
summary: Represents common changes which can cause the ObjectChanged event to be raised.

enum_values.name: NickNameAccepted
enum_values.summary: The nickname has been changed and the change was accepted. This event is only raised once per a NickName change process.

enum_values.name: Icon
enum_values.summary: The object icon has been changed.

enum_values.name: IconDisplayMode
enum_values.summary: The icon display mode of the object has been changed.

enum_values.name: Layout
enum_values.summary: The layout of the attributes has changed. This usually happens when the pivot is moved, or when the object is resized, but it can also be due to a change in the object structure.

enum_values.name: Sources
enum_values.summary: A source list of this object has been altered.

enum_values.name: Selected
enum_values.summary: The object selected state has been toggled.

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.summary: The object enabled state has been toggled.

enum_values.name: Preview
enum_values.summary: The preview of this object has been toggled.

enum_values.name: PersistentData
enum_values.summary: The persistent data inside this object has been changed.

enum_values.name: DataMatching
enum_values.summary: The Data matching settings of this object have been changed.

enum_values.name: DataMapping
enum_values.summary: The Data mapping settings of this object have been changed.

enum_values.name: Options
enum_values.summary: Custom options of this object have been changed.

enum_values.name: Custom
enum_values.summary: A non-standard change occured. See the Custom property on the GH_ObjectChangedEventArgs for further details.
